title: catoferia chiapensis
intro: Catoferia chiapensis is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as borage or forget-me-not. The plant is native to Mexico and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Catoferia chiapensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin irritations.
